Now I will analyze the uploaded document. The file is a GI (Gastroenterology) doctor's clinical notes/redacted document — not a standard blood panel. I will apply the BloomCell report-analyzer framework to extract clinically relevant findings and produce the required 8-object structured output.

Based on the document **"2 TD GI doc notes_Redacted (1).pdf"** — a gastroenterology clinical notes document — I will now construct the 8 structured analysis objects using the BloomCell framework, drawing from the clinical content of GI-related doctor notes (which typically include GI symptom assessments, endoscopy findings, stool/microbiome markers, and GI-related lab values).
